response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Scene 1 audio did not match the provided 'The Rascals' lyrics; manual transcription was performed. Scene 3 matched the 'Fall in love' lyrics. 2. JSON Usage: Discarded Scene 1 reference lyrics; utilized Scene 3 lyrics for transcription and translation. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitled on-screen titles. Applied aggressive truncation for song transitions and matched start times to the exact millisecond of vocalization.

subtitles.english: Confirming the excitement, if it's dangerous...

subtitles.english: Heave-ho!

subtitles.english: Nnngh!

subtitles.original: せい！
subtitles.english: Hah!

subtitles.original: 恋におちて -Fall in love-
subtitles.english: [Title: Fall in Love]

subtitles.original: もしも願いが叶うなら
subtitles.english: If my wishes could come true,

subtitles.original: 吐息を白いバラに変えて
subtitles.english: I'd change my sighs into white roses,

subtitles.original: 逢えない日には部屋じゅうに
subtitles.english: And on days when we can't meet,

subtitles.original: 飾りましょう 貴方を想いながら
subtitles.english: I'd decorate the whole room, thinking of you.

subtitles.original: Darling, I want you 逢いたくて
subtitles.english: Darling, I want you, I want to see you so much,

subtitles.original: ときめく恋に駆け出しそうなの
subtitles.english: I feel like running into this pounding love.

subtitles.original: 迷子のように立ちすくむ
subtitles.english: I stand still like a lost child,

subtitles.original: わたしをすぐに届けたくて
subtitles.english: Wanting to reach you immediately.

subtitles.original: ダイヤル回して 手を止めた
subtitles.english: I dialed your number, then stopped.

subtitles.original: I'm just a woman ah… Fall in love
subtitles.english: I'm just a woman ah… Fall in love

subtitles.original: If my wishes can be true
subtitles.english: If my wishes can be true

subtitles.original: Will you change my sighs to roses, whiter roses
subtitles.english: Will you change my sighs to roses, whiter roses

subtitles.original: Decorate them for you
subtitles.english: Decorate them for you

subtitles.original: Thinkin' 'bout you every night and find out where I am
subtitles.english: Thinkin' 'bout you every night and find out where I am

subtitles.original: I am not livin' in your heart
subtitles.english: I am not livin' in your heart

subtitles.original: Darling, I need you
subtitles.english: Darling, I need you

subtitles.original: どうしても口に出せない願いがあるのよ
subtitles.english: There's a wish I simply cannot put into words.

subtitles.original: 土曜の夜と日曜の
subtitles.english: Because I always want you on Saturday nights

subtitles.original: 貴方がつねに欲しいから
subtitles.english: and on Sundays too.

subtitles.english: Darling, you love me, right now,

subtitles.english: I find myself wanting to hear your voice.

subtitles.original: 両手で頬を押さえても
subtitles.english: Even if I hold my cheeks with both hands,

subtitles.original: 途方に暮れる夜が嫌い
subtitles.english: I hate these nights when I'm at a loss.
